prompt:
Using uploaded face 100% realistic.
Create a high-end cinematic double-exposure fashion poster using the uploaded reference photo for the same face, hairstyle, beard, skin tone, and facial features.

Composition: a large dramatic close-up portrait of the same young South Asian man in the background on the left side, wearing stylish black rectangular eyeglasses, looking slightly toward the right with an intense serious expression. His thick black hair is styled upward with clean faded sides, detailed beard and mustache, sharp realistic facial features.

In the foreground, show the same man sitting confidently on a glossy black cube. He is wearing an all-black stylish outfit: black bomber jacket, plain black t-shirt, black fitted trousers, black wristwatch, and clean white sneakers. Pose: legs slightly apart, elbows resting naturally on knees, one hand hanging relaxed, the other hand near the wristwatch, looking directly at the camera with a serious confident expression.

Background: split cinematic atmosphere with electric blue smoke and glowing blue particles on the left side, fiery orange smoke, sparks, and glowing embers on the right side. Add subtle swirling smoke behind the subject, dramatic rim lighting, blue and orange light reflections on the glossy black floor, and a clear reflection of the shoes and cube.

Ultra-realistic, photorealistic face, premium men’s fashion editorial, cinematic double exposure, dramatic blue-and-orange color grading, high contrast, detailed skin texture, sharp focus, shallow depth of field, professional DSLR photography, 8K quality, vertical 9:16 composition.

Negative prompt: different face, blurry face, distorted face, extra fingers, bad hands, duplicate body, deformed anatomy, low quality, cartoon, watermark, logo, text, oversaturated colors, blurry shoes.

promptZh:
使用上传的人脸，实现 100% 真实效果。
创建一个高端电影感双重曝光时尚海报，使用上传的参考照片，确保人脸、发型、胡须、肤色和面部特征保持一致。

构图：背景左侧为 同一位年轻南亚男性 的大型戏剧性特写肖像，佩戴时尚的黑色长方形眼镜，微微看向右侧，表情严肃而强烈。他浓密的黑发向上梳理，两侧修剪整齐，胡须和八字胡细节丰富，面部特征清晰逼真。

前景中，展示同一位男性自信地坐在一个光亮的黑色立方体上。他身穿 全黑时尚套装：黑色飞行员夹克、纯黑色 T 恤、黑色修身长裤，佩戴黑色腕表，穿着干净的白色运动鞋。姿势：双腿微张，肘部自然地放在膝盖上，一只手自然下垂，另一只手靠近腕表，直视镜头，表情严肃自信。

背景：分裂的电影感氛围，左侧为电光蓝烟雾和发光的蓝色粒子，右侧为炽热的橙色烟雾、火花和发光的余烬。在主体后方添加细腻的缭绕烟雾，戏剧性的轮廓光，光亮黑色地板上的蓝橙色光影反射，以及鞋子和立方体的清晰倒影。

超写实，照片级真实人脸，高端男士时尚杂志风格，电影级双重曝光，戏剧性的蓝橙色调，高对比度，细腻的皮肤纹理，焦点清晰，浅景深，专业单反摄影，8K 画质，9:16 竖构图。

负面提示词：不同的人脸、模糊的人脸、扭曲的人脸、多余的手指、糟糕的手部、重复的身体、畸形的解剖结构、低质量、卡通、水印、Logo、文字、色彩过饱和、鞋子模糊。
